## Summary

Describe the change clearly and briefly.

## Testing

- [ ] `make fmt-check`
- [ ] `make clippy`
- [ ] `make test`

List any additional manual testing you performed.

## Screenshots

Include screenshots when this pull request changes visible UI behavior.
Use only sanitized images and do not include real patient data, PHI, secrets,
or other private information.

## Checklist

- [ ] The pull request title is short and descriptive.
- [ ] I explained what changed and how it was tested.
- [ ] I added or updated tests when behavior changed, or this change is docs/config only.
